description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a vibrant blue exterior. The front is dominated by a large, edge-to-edge touchscreen display with a black bezel and a small notch at the top housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The back is smooth and glossy, displaying a centered Apple logo and a dual-camera module with two lenses and a flash in the top left corner. The sides are slightly curved, with visible physical buttons for volume and power control. The device appears to be constructed primarily from glass and metal, with a plastic or composite frame for added durability. Its compact size and ergonomic design make it suitable for handheld use in various urban environments.
description: A blue, modern smartphone with a large touchscreen, dual rear cameras, and a glossy finish. Features a centered Apple logo and side buttons for control.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large touchscreen display with app icons, a black bezel, and a top notch for sensors and the front camera.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the slim profile and a single elongated button, likely for volume control.
description_view_2: Back view highlighting the glossy blue surface, centered Apple logo, and dual camera module with flash in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim profile and two distinct buttons, likely for power and additional controls.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, clearly visible against the blue surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful wallpaper with app icons arranged in a grid, including Calendar, Photos, Camera, Mail, and others. The time is shown at the top left, and the interface resembles iOS with a dock at the bottom.
attribute_camera_placement: There are two camera lenses and a flash arranged in a vertical module at the top left corner on the back of the device.
attribute_button_layout: One elongated button is visible on the left edge (likely volume), and two buttons are on the right edge (likely power and mute/lock). All buttons are slim and rectangular.
